name: Insert Item Apocalypse
short_description: Insert Item Apocalypse - interactive 3D puzzle in genre "find and click". Explore a world full of many details, conveying the spirit of the aftermath of a major man-made disaster.
detailed_description:
Insert Item Apocalypse - interactive 3D puzzle in genre "find and click".
In the game you will find yourself in a world after the apocalypse, where everything is abandoned and devastated.
You will have to fly around the map and search for various items in this dangerous world.
Travel through destroyed cities, abandoned forests, and radiation zones to find all the necessary items.
Explore a world full of many details, conveying the spirit of the aftermath of a major man-made disaster.
Can you gather all the resources you need in this merciless world of the apocalypse?
